title: Harden Bash hook to enforce background-agent discipline

log.message: Created from Congress #12 verdict on: What should BigClungus work on first tomorrow? Candidates: (1) multi-model routing so Grok/Gemini/GP

Source verdict: Option 2 — the Bash hook hardening — is the only candidate that fixes a failure mode already causing real damage: every time BigClungus runs a shell command on the main thread, the bot goes dark and u...
Bash hook (bash-intercept.sh) was created at 07:55 and blocks main-thread Bash calls. CLAUDE.md escape hatches closed in commit 41ae925. Core objective achieved.
